nasb.text: This sentence is by the decree of the angelic watchers And the decision is a command of the holy ones, In order that the living may know That the Most High is ruler over the realm of mankind, And bestows it on whom He wishes And sets over it the lowliest of men.”

esv.text: The sentence is by the decree of the watchers, the decision by the word of the holy ones, to the end that the living may know that the Most High rules the kingdom of men and gives it to whom he will and sets over it the lowliest of men.’

cnv.text: 這是守望者宣告的裁決， 是聖者頒布的決定， 好使世人都知道： 至高者在世人的國中掌權， 他喜歡把國賜給誰，就賜給誰， 甚至立最卑微的人執掌國權。

ccb.text: 这是守望者的命令，是圣者的决定，要让众生知道至高者主宰世上万国，祂要把国赐给谁就赐给谁，即使是最卑微的人。’
